imageMessage.caption:
The RISK others are taking that you are not taking, Is what puts them ahead of you. This is one of the secrets of the RICH, Listen whenever I tell those secrets to you

Opportunity never comes to those who just wait. It will be captured by those really seek them. 

For you to get what you haven’t gotten before you have to do what you haven’t done before 

Try out good things and you won’t regret 💯💰

🚀✨*🛑I don't work with a crowd🧏🧏I work with a team
T-together
E-Everyone
A-achieves 
M-more
*Make me your Upline and mentor and let me help you grow now ✌️😁*
*✊ ✅ As long as you twist your mindset.. Nothing is hard ❤️😁👊*🙏😁

⭕Inbox me 📬 and comment *"LINK"*✅

videoMessage.caption:
😂😂 *Kuna mtu ukimwambia nafanya NETWORKING. Anachekaa* 🤣🤣🧏🏻‍♀️ *anakuuliza tena kwa ujasiri kabisa ety hivi umekosa kazi ya kufanya* 😱🙆🏼‍♂️. *Muda huo yeye kasubiri laki 3 kwa mwezi* 🤣🤭 *Huku sisi hiyo pesa tunatengeneza kwa week 1 tuu* 🤷🏼‍♂️🤭. 

*Hivi my dear, NETWORK MARKETING ni biashara ya DUNIA sijui unanielewa* 🧏🏻‍♀️. *Hapa sisi tunatengeneza pesa ya kueleweka* 🤷🏼‍♂️ *wala sio pesa ya vinyanya na vitunguu* 🙆🏼‍♂️🤭 *ila nakupa polee sana utakuja kushtuka jua lishazama* 🤷🏼‍♂️🌥️. 

*Edeleeni kujazana ujinga ety ni SCAM* 🙆🏼‍♂️🤣🧏🏻‍♀️. *Na wewe ukiambiwa scam unakubali kwani una akili za kushikiwa* 🤷🏼‍♂️🧏🏻‍♀️. 

*Usije ukasema sikukwambia mtaji sasa mtaji ni 12000TZs tuu kuanza* 💸💰

*Type NIELEKEZE📥*

extendedTextMessage.text: There's a day I promised I'll post loyal viwers ofc I forgot anyways today I'll post my 100 and 200th viewer 😂😂😂💔🙌
